title: acetosella pentaphylloides
intro: Acetosella pentaphylloides, also known as the mountain cranberry, is a type of flowering plant native to alpine and subalpine regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Acetosella pentaphylloides include reducing inflammation, relieving urinary tract issues, and promoting overall digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support kidney function and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones.
